title: Wikiful
description: A simple data-driven tip and wiki library mod.
body:
# Wikiful

This library mod aims to do exactly what it says on the tin: add simple tips and wikis for mods and datapacks.

The main differentiator between Wikiful and other similar library mods is that it **does not use guidebooks**. Tips only pop up once when you trigger a certain event, and Wiki pages are available via the Wiki button in the pause menu.

Wikiful's features are all server-side. While it can be enhanced with client-side features (particularly for custom background sprites), you can build wikis without needing the client to have anything but Wikiful installed.

Wikiful is also a relatively simple library mod, with a concise and easy-to-learn format. There's a [wiki](https://github.com/Apollounknowndev/wikiful/wiki), a [template datapack](https://github.com/Apollounknowndev/wikiful/tree/main/example-datapack) you can reference, and in the future there will be a Misode generator for it.

---

> Keep in mind that this mod is in BETA right now. If you have change/addition requests, feel free to make them on the Github page.
